changelog: HERO TITLE — fits on ONE LINE now. Dropped from 44sp to 32sp + maxLines=1 so 'Timberwolves @ Spurs' (and any other matchup label) no longer wraps and never overlaps the right-side team-logo backdrop.

GAME CARD — full team names now appear UNDER each team logo (no more TIMBERW... ellipsis). Layout is three side-by-side columns: [logo / NAME] [score or VS] [logo / NAME]. Score/VS is height-locked to the badge so it visually centers on the logos. Names use 10sp Black with softWrap disabled so they NEVER show '...'.
